entities.name: MORPHOAGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and agricultural characteristics used to characterize crop collections

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Biological factors that cause stress to crops

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-biological factors that cause stress to crops

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand biotic and abiotic stresses

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: The process of improving crops using germplasm and economic traits

entities.name: ECONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits of crops that have economic value and are used in breeding

entities.name: CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A representative subset of approximately 10% of an entire crop collection used to identify diversity and resistance

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A highly reduced representative subset of about 1% of an entire crop collection used to identify diversity and resistance
